mapper.sql: pept.header_id as pep_id, pept.employee_id as pe_id, pept.company, pept.post, pept.remarks, pept.instructions_flag, pept.check_flag, pept.enabled_flag, pept.id, pept.update_time, pept.update_by, pept.create_time, pept.create_by

${tAlias}.header_id as ${tAlias}_pep_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.company as ${tAlias}_company, ${tAlias}.post as ${tAlias}_post, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.instructions_flag as ${tAlias}_instructions_flag, ${tAlias}.check_flag as ${tAlias}_check_flag, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_postother_temp (header_id, employee_id, company, post, remarks, instructions_flag, check_flag, enabled_flag, update_time, update_by, create_time, create_by) values (#{employeePostother.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_postother_temp set header_id = #{employeePostother.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, company = #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post = #{post,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, instructions_flag = #{instructionsFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, check_flag = #{checkFlag,jdbcType=CHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
